name: codanna
description: Codanna MCP integration for Claude Code.

interface.longDescription: Starts Codanna MCP for semantic code search, relationship tracing, and indexed docs.
defaultPrompt: Activate Codanna for the current project.
Install Codanna if it is missing from this machine.
Initialize the current project for Codanna and create its first index when needed.
Use Codanna to search code semantically.
Use Codanna to trace calls, callers, and impact before edits.
